services/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version properties for Spring Core, Web, WebMVC, and Context as they are now managed by the parent.
Remove explicit Tomcat embed core version property as it is managed by Spring Boot.
Remove explicit Spring LDAP core version property as it is managed by Spring Boot.
Remove explicit Eureka client version property as it is managed by Spring Cloud BOM.
Add Guava library dependency which was likely required by new code or transitive dependencies.

Remove manual exclusion for Spring LDAP Core from spring-boot-starter-data-ldap.
Remove explicit dependencies for Spring Core, Web, WebMVC, and Context which are now provided transitively.

.agent/rules/verification-guide.md.general_idea: Add a comprehensive manual verification checklist for chatbot UI, streaming transport, and backend contract changes.
.agent/rules/verification-guide.md.human_impl: Added section '## Chatbot Verification Requirements' with 17 specific verification steps covering modal interaction, streaming, tool calls, and branch navigation.

.claude/CLAUDE.md.general_idea: Replace pnpm with npm as the primary package manager for the monorepo.

.claude/commands/speckit.clarify.md.general_idea: Reduce the maximum number of clarification questions allowed in a session from 10 to 5 to enforce stricter brevity.
.claude/commands/speckit.clarify.md.human_impl: Changed 'Maximum of 10 total questions' to 'Maximum of 5 total questions' in .claude/commands/speckit.clarify.md

.claude/commands/speckit.constitution.md.general_idea: Update the constitution command instructions to clarify that the target file is a filled constitution, not the raw template, and add a fallback step if the file is missing.
.claude/commands/speckit.constitution.md.human_impl: Changed 'Load the existing constitution template' to 'Load the existing constitution' and added a note to copy from template if missing.

.claude/commands/speckit.plan.md.general_idea: Add logic to check for and execute optional or mandatory extension hooks defined in .specify/extensions.yml before the planning phase begins.
.claude/commands/speckit.plan.md.human_impl: Added 'Pre-Execution Checks' section with YAML parsing logic for hooks.before_plan

.claude/commands/speckit.plan.md.general_idea: Add logic to check for and execute optional or mandatory extension hooks defined in .specify/extensions.yml after the planning phase completes.
.claude/commands/speckit.plan.md.human_impl: Added step 5 'Check for extension hooks' with YAML parsing logic for hooks.after_plan

.claude/commands/speckit.plan.md.general_idea: Broaden the scope of contract generation from strictly REST/GraphQL APIs to any external interface contracts suitable for the project type.
.claude/commands/speckit.plan.md.human_impl: Renamed 'Generate API contracts' to 'Define interface contracts' and expanded examples to include CLI, parsers, etc.

.claude/commands/speckit.specify.md.general_idea: Introduce logic to check for and execute pre- and post-specification extension hooks defined in .specify/extensions.yml.
.claude/commands/speckit.specify.md.human_impl: Added 'Pre-Execution Checks' and step 8 to read .specify/extensions.yml and handle hooks.before_specify and hooks.after_specify.

.claude/commands/speckit.specify.md.general_idea: Remove manual branch number calculation logic in favor of letting the script auto-detect the next available number.
.claude/commands/speckit.specify.md.human_impl: Replaced complex git fetch/grep logic with a single instruction to run .specify/scripts/bash/create-new-feature.sh without --number.

.claude/commands/speckit.specify.md.general_idea: Correct the step numbering in the workflow instructions to account for the new hook checking steps.

.claude/commands/speckit.specify.md.general_idea: Update default integration pattern guidelines to be more flexible and project-appropriate rather than strictly RESTful.
